headline: FreeMind Investments and Daewoong Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Invest in General Proximity
summary: FreeMind Investments (FMI), a venture capital fund launched in partnership between FreeMind Group and Daewoong Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., today announced its investment in General Proximity, a San Francisco-based biotechnology company pioneering the next generation of induced proximity medicines.

headline: Are These 5 Biotech Stocks Set to Beat Q1 Earnings Estimates?
summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Novavax and three other biotechs show strong Earnings ESP signals, hinting at potential Q1 earnings beat as sector results roll in.
